basic_details.job_title: MahaRERA Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 11 Administrative Officer, Technical Consultant and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Administrative Officer, Technical Consultant and More
basic_details.short_information: Maharashtra Real Estate Regulatory Authority (MahaRERA) Consultants Notification 2026 has been released on 05 May 2026 on the official website of Maharashtra Real Estate Regulatory Authority. A total of 11 vacancies have been announced through the MahaRERA Consultants Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate, Post Graduate, CA, CA Inter, MBA Finance, LL.B., B.E. Civil, B.Arch
qualification.details: Senior Finance Consultant: Chartered Accountant (CA Final passed), 2 years experience in government/public sector/public utility accounts, knowledge of accounting procedures, drafting & communication skills, computer literacy. Finance Consultant: M.Com / MBA (Finance) / CA Inter (Second Level) preferred, Graduate in Commerce/Statistics, 3 years experience in government/public sector accounts, knowledge of accounting procedures, drafting & communication skills, computer literacy. Technical Consultant: B.E. Civil / B.Arch or equivalent, Retired government/semi-government Asst. Engineer (Civil)/Architect/Town Planning & Valuation officer OR 5+ years experience in equivalent capacity, MS Office proficiency. Junior Legal Consultant: LL.B. degree, 2+ years as standing counsel/panel advocate OR legal officer in govt/PSU/corporation/court OR minimum 1 year experience in MahaRERA, good drafting & legal skills. Administrative Officer: Any graduate degree, Minimum 10 years experience in Group-A administrative post (government), MS Office proficiency.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the MahaRERA Consultants recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the MahaRERA Consultants recruitment is 15th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Consultants posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 11 vacancies announced for the Consultants posts by MahaRERA.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply for these posts through email only.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Consultant positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 35,000/- to Rs. 80,000/-.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: The qualifications vary by post and include Graduate, Post Graduate, CA, CA Inter, MBA Finance, LL.B., B.E. Civil, and B.Arch degrees.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for MahaRERA recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category of candidates for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these consultant roles?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting of applications followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Which city are these positions based in?
faq.answer: The positions are based in Mumbai, Maharashtra.

faq.question: Q9. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This is a contractual recruitment for the Consultants posts.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article.
